from.description: Agent name that produced this handoff.

to.description: Agent name or 'orchestrator' that should receive it.

status.description: ready=proceed; blocked=next agent cannot start; partial=proceed with caveats; completed/failed=terminal.

summary.description: One-sentence description of what was done or what went wrong.

key_decisions.description: Important decisions made that downstream agents should know.

blockers.description: Required when status=blocked. Reasons why next agent cannot proceed.

context.description: Free-form additional context for the receiving agent.

confidence.description: If low, receiving agent must re-verify artifacts before acting.
